summary: Closed M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-RECOVERY-001 after PR #223 passed CI and entered origin/main at 6249dd4a69a355722d575efdda71304f12197fdd. The accepted planning package records the product-owner topology REQUEST_CHANGES, ADR-010, downstream topology task chain, systems_architect ACCEPT, and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. Formal M7 content lock remains blocked; M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 must not start.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke PASS; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact PASS.

tests_run.command: gh pr merge 223 --squash --delete-branch --subject "chore(process): accept M7 map topology recovery plan"
git status --short --branch && git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/main
tests_run.result: Local main and origin/main both at 6249dd4a69a355722d575efdda71304f12197fdd before closure branch was created.

decisions.decision: M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-RECOVERY-001 is CLOSED only after PR #223 entered origin/main.
M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 is now the next READY task and must implement authoritative topology definitions before fixture/client/validation tasks proceed.
Formal M7 content lock remains blocked until the full topology recovery chain validates and product-owner reconsideration reopens.

risks.summary: ADR-010 is accepted for planning but the schema, fixture, client, and validation tasks are not yet implemented.
risks.mitigation: Start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 next; keep content lock and M7 exit blocked.

requested_action: Start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 from main with systems_architect ownership and preserve ADR-010 boundaries.
